children.characters: Heavy squat day, upper body lift, push day.

children.name: Insight Description
children.characters:
Your fluid needs are higher today due to training intensity. Starting earlier will help maintain energy 
and performance.

children.name: Recommendation
children.characters: Increase intake over the next few hours.

children.name: Recommendation
children.characters: Keep fluids steady instead of catching up later.

children.name: Recommendation
children.characters: Focus on hydration around your next activity.
